info.title: SVP Analytics API
info.description: SVP Partner Engagement Dashboard - Backend API (SRS v1.0)

post.description: Authenticates an admin or partner user and returns a JWT token. Partner users can sign in using the temporary password sent during registration.

user.description: Authenticated user profile. Partner users include partner_id and partner_name.

400.description: Validation error — email and password required

post.description: Sends a one-time password (OTP) to the user email if it exists. Always returns success to prevent email enumeration.
Sets a new password using email + OTP.
For first-time partner registration, creates the partner user login and sends a temporary password via email for immediate sign-in.
Client-side token discard (stateless JWT). Requires authentication.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user profile (without password_hash).
Returns a list of all chapters.
Returns a single chapter by its UUID.
Returns partners for a chapter. Supports filtering by active status and primary flag.

parameters.name: chapter_id
parameters.description: Chapter UUID (defaults to authenticated user chapter)

post.description: Creates a new partner. Requires chapter_id, partner_name, and start_date.

409.description: Partner with this email already exists in this chapter

get.description: Returns a partner with groups and appointment details. Optionally filtered by month and year.

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: Month name, e.g. January. Defaults to current month.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: Year, e.g. 2025. Defaults to current year.

delete.description: Deletes a partner. Blocked if referenced by other entities.

409.description: Partner is referenced and cannot be deleted

get.description: Returns investees for a chapter. Supports filtering by active status.

parameters.name: chapter_id
parameters.description: Chapter UUID (defaults to authenticated user chapter)

post.description: Creates a new investee. Requires chapter_id, investee_name, email, and start_date.

get.description: Returns an investee with groups and appointment details. Optionally filtered by month and year.

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: Month number 1-12. Defaults to current month.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: Year, e.g. 2025. Defaults to current year.

delete.description: Deletes an investee. Blocked if referenced by other entities.

409.description: Investee is referenced and cannot be deleted

get.description: Returns groups for a chapter. Supports filtering by active status and group type.

parameters.name: chapter_id
parameters.description: Chapter UUID (defaults to authenticated user chapter)

post.description: Creates a new group. Requires chapter_id, group_name, group_type_id, and start_date.

get.summary: List active group IDs for current partner
get.description: Returns active group IDs assigned to the authenticated partner account.
Returns a group with its member partners.

delete.description: Deletes a group. Blocked if referenced in recurring appointments.

409.description: Group is referenced and cannot be deleted

put.description: Overwrites the list of partners assigned to a group.

get.description: Returns appointments for a chapter, paginated by month and year. Partner users are automatically scoped to their assigned meetings.

parameters.name: chapter_id
parameters.description: Chapter UUID (defaults to authenticated user chapter)

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: Month number (1-12). Defaults to current month.

200.description: List of appointments with pagination metadata

post.description: Creates a new appointment with optional partner and investee associations.

get.summary: List overdue pending appointments for the current user
get.description: Returns pending appointments in the past that are assigned to the authenticated user. Partners only see meetings assigned to them.

get.summary: List appointments assigned to the current partner
get.description: For partner users returns all assigned appointments; admins can use partner_id query when needed.
Returns an appointment with investee, recurring appointment, and partners details.

put.description: Update appointment details. Can include start_at, end_at, type, investee, partners, and status.

delete.description: Deletes an appointment and cascades to appointment_partners.

patch.description: Marks an appointment as completed and records partner attendance.

404.description: Appointment not found or already completed

post.description: Bulk import appointments (JSON array of rows). Validates uniqueness by name and by date+name.

get.description: Returns all recurring appointment templates for a chapter.

parameters.name: chapter_id
parameters.description: Chapter UUID (defaults to authenticated user chapter)

post.description: Creates a new recurring appointment template with an rrule schedule. end_date cannot be more than 1 year from today.

400.description: Validation error (missing fields, invalid rrule, or end_date too far)

get.description: Returns a recurring appointment template with partners, group and investee details.

put.description: Updates a template. Only affects unmaterialized occurrences. Validates rrule and end_date if provided.

400.description: Validation error (invalid rrule or end_date too far)

delete.description: Deletes the template. Sets rec_appointment_id = NULL in materialized appointments.

post.description: Creates a PENDING appointment for a specific occurrence_date from a recurring template. The date must fall within the template range and be a valid rrule occurrence.

201.description: Occurrence materialized as a new appointment

400.description: Validation error (missing date, out of range, or not a valid rrule occurrence)

409.description: This occurrence has already been materialized

get.description: Returns partner engagement stats: meetings attended, hours spent, last meeting date
Returns category metrics: meetings count, distinct partners, hours, average duration
Returns monthly engagement: meetings count, distinct partners engaged
Returns investee metrics: meetings count, hours spent, average duration
Returns a detailed row-per-partner list for appointments within a date range (YYYY-MM-DD).
Returns all group types for the authenticated user chapter.

post.description: Creates a new group type for the authenticated user chapter.

delete.description: Deletes a group type by ID. Blocked if referenced by groups.

409.description: Group type is referenced and cannot be deleted

get.description: Returns all appointment types for the authenticated user chapter.

post.description: Creates a new appointment type for the authenticated user chapter.

delete.description: Deletes an appointment type by ID. Blocked if referenced.

409.description: Appointment type is referenced and cannot be deleted
